creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=903b912a3ba39337ea0a60d71c62ee90f0d72e3c

commit 903b912a3ba39337ea0a60d71c62ee90f0d72e3c
Author:     Kai Knoblich <kai@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2021-04-19 14:50:22 +0000
Commit:     Kai Knoblich <kai@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2021-04-19 14:53:15 +0000

    www/py-http-parser: Fix packaging with Python 3.8+

    * Apply the same fix as in 9cb5898561b302d952fec8e2fac66a945a2c4915 by
      stripping libraries by wildcard paths.

    * Also use PYTHONPREFIX_SITELIBDIR instead PYTHON_SITELIBDIR to make
      the port PREFIX safe while I'm here.

    PR:             253815
    Approved by:    python (with hat)

 www/py-http-parser/Makefile | 2 +-
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 1 deletion(-)
